briefdescription.para: Type used to represent an observer type.

detaileddescription.para: A observer can be a listener or a subscriber.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_channel *chan, const void *msg, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_chan_pub

briefdescription.para: Publish to a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine publishes a message to a channel.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to the message where the publish function copies the channel's message data from.
Waiting period to publish the channel, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The message is invalid based on the validator function or some of the observers could not receive the notification.

A parameter is incorrect, the notification could not be sent to one or more observer, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Read a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine reads a message from a channel.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to the message where the read function copies the channel's message data to.
Waiting period to read the channel, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Claim a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine claims a channel. During the claiming period the channel is blocked for publishing, reading, notifying or claiming again. Finishing is the only available action.

simplesect.para: After calling this routine, the channel cannot be used by other thread until the zbus_chan_finish routine is performed.
This routine should only be called once before a zbus_chan_finish.

parameterdescription.para: Waiting period to claim the channel, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Finish a channel claim.

detaileddescription.para: This routine finishes a channel claim. After calling this routine with success, the channel will be able to be used by other thread.

simplesect.para: This routine must only be used after a zbus_chan_claim.

parameterdescription.para: A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Force a channel notification.

detaileddescription.para: This routine forces the event dispatcher to notify the channel's observers even if the message has no changes. Note this function could be useful after claiming/finishing actions.

parameterdescription.para: Waiting period to notify the channel, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The channel's semaphore returned without waiting.
Timeout to take the channel's semaphore.
There is not more buffer on the message buffers pool.

A parameter is incorrect, the notification could not be sent to one or more observer, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Get the channel's name.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the channel's name reference.

simplesect.para: Channel's name reference.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a zbus channel from its numeric identifier.

parameterdescription.para: If channel with ID channel_id does not exist.
Channel pointer with ID channel_id otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a zbus channel from its name string.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the channel to retrieve.
If channel with name name does not exist.
Channel pointer with name name otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the reference for a channel message directly.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the reference of a channel message.

simplesect.para: This function must only be used directly for already locked channels. This can be done inside a listener for the receiving channel or after claim a channel.
Channel's message reference.

briefdescription.para: Get a constant reference for a channel message directly.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns a constant reference of a channel message. This should be used inside listeners to access the message directly. In this way zbus prevents the listener of changing the notifying channel's message during the notification process.

simplesect.para: This function must only be used directly for already locked channels. This can be done inside a listener for the receiving channel or after claim a channel.
A constant channel's message reference.

briefdescription.para: Get the channel's message size.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the channel's message size.

simplesect.para: Channel's message size.

briefdescription.para: Get the channel's user data.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the channel's user data.

simplesect.para: Channel's user data.

briefdescription.para: Set the channel's msg subscriber net_buf pool.

parameterdescription.para: The reference to the net_buf memory pool.

briefdescription.para: Update the publishing statistics for a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This function updates the publishing statistics for the zbus_chan_claim -> zbus_chan_finish workflow, which cannot automatically determine whether new data has been published or not.

simplesect.para: This function must only be used directly for already locked channels.

briefdescription.para: Get the time a channel was last published to.

simplesect.para: Will return 0 if channel has not yet been published to.
The kernel timestamp of the last publishing action.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of times a channel has been published to.

simplesect.para: Will return 0 if channel has not yet been published to.
The number of times a channel has been published to.

briefdescription.para: Get the average period between publishes to a channel.

simplesect.para: Will return 0 if channel has not yet been published to.
Average duration in milliseconds between publishes.

briefdescription.para: Get the age of a message in a channel.

parameterdescription.para: if channel has never been published to

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_channel *chan, const struct zbus_observer *obs, struct zbus_observer_node *node, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_chan_add_obs_with_node

briefdescription.para: Add an observer to a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine adds an observer to the channel by providing an allocated node. This function is only supported if the CONFIG_ZBUS_RUNTIME_OBSERVERS_NODE_ALLOC_NONE is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The observer's reference to be added.
Persistent structure to link the channel to the observer
Waiting period to add an observer, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The observer is already present in the channel's observers list.
The observer is already present in the channel's runtime observers list.
The node is already in use.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_channel *chan, const struct zbus_observer *obs, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_chan_add_obs

briefdescription.para: Add an observer to a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine adds an observer to the channel in runtime. This function is only supported if the CONFIG_ZBUS_RUNTIME_OBSERVERS_NODE_ALLOC_DYNAMIC or CONFIG_ZBUS_RUNTIME_OBSERVERS_NODE_ALLOC_STATIC is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The observer's reference to be added.
Waiting period to add an observer, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The observer is already present in the channel's observers list.
The observer is already present in the channel's runtime observers list.
No memory available for a new runtime observer node.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_channel *chan, const struct zbus_observer *obs, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_chan_rm_obs

briefdescription.para: Remove an observer from a channel.

detaileddescription.para: This routine removes an observer to the channel.

parameterdescription.para: The observer's reference to be removed.
Waiting period to remove an observer, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
no observer found in channel's runtime observer list.

briefdescription.para: Change the observer state.

detaileddescription.para: This routine changes the observer state. A channel when disabled will not receive notifications from the event dispatcher.

parameterdescription.para: State to be. When false the observer stops to receive notifications.
A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Get the observer state.

detaileddescription.para: This routine retrieves the observer state.

simplesect.para: Observer state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_observer *obs, const struct zbus_channel *chan, bool masked)
memberdef.name: zbus_obs_set_chan_notification_mask

briefdescription.para: Mask notifications from a channel to an observer.

detaileddescription.para: The observer can mask notifications from a specific observing channel by calling this function.

parameterdescription.para: The observer's reference to be added.
The mask state. When the mask is true, the observer will not receive notifications from the channel.
Channel notifications masked to the observer.
No observation found for the related pair chan/obs.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_observer *obs, const struct zbus_channel *chan, bool *masked)
memberdef.name: zbus_obs_is_chan_notification_masked

briefdescription.para: Get the notifications masking state from a channel to an observer.

parameterdescription.para: The observer's reference to be added.
The mask state. When the mask is true, the observer will not receive notifications from the channel.
No observation found for the related pair chan/obs.

briefdescription.para: Get the observer's name.

detaileddescription.para: This routine returns the observer's name reference.

simplesect.para: The observer's name reference.

briefdescription.para: Set the observer thread priority by attaching it to a thread.

parameterdescription.para: A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Clear the observer thread priority by detaching it from a thread.

parameterdescription.para: A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_observer *sub, const struct zbus_channel **chan, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_sub_wait

briefdescription.para: Wait for a channel notification.

detaileddescription.para: This routine makes the subscriber to wait a notification. The notification comes as a channel reference.

parameterdescription.para: Waiting period for a notification arrival, or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The observer is not a subscriber.
A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct zbus_observer *sub, const struct zbus_channel **chan, void *msg, k_timeout_t timeout)
memberdef.name: zbus_sub_wait_msg

briefdescription.para: Wait for a channel message.

detaileddescription.para: This routine makes the subscriber wait for the new message in case of channel publication.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to a copy of the published message.
Waiting period for a notification arrival, or one of the special values, K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.
The observer is not a subscriber.
Could not retrieve the net_buf from the subscriber FIFO.
A parameter is incorrect, or the function context is invalid (inside an ISR). The function only returns this value when the CONFIG_ZBUS_ASSERT_MOCK is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Iterate over channels.

detaileddescription.para: Enables the developer to iterate over the channels giving to this function an iterator_func which is called for each channel. If the iterator_func returns false all the iteration stops.

parameterdescription.para: The function that will be execute on each iteration.
Iterator could not be executed. Some iterate returned false.

briefdescription.para: Iterate over channels with user data.

detaileddescription.para: Enables the developer to iterate over the channels giving to this function an iterator_func which is called for each channel. If the iterator_func returns false all the iteration stops.

parameterdescription.para: The function that will be execute on each iteration.
The user data that can be passed in the function.
Iterator could not be executed. Some iterate returned false.

briefdescription.para: Iterate over observers.

detaileddescription.para: Enables the developer to iterate over the observers giving to this function an iterator_func which is called for each observer. If the iterator_func returns false all the iteration stops.

parameterdescription.para: The function that will be execute on each iteration.
Iterator could not be executed. Some iterate returned false.

briefdescription.para: Iterate over observers with user data.

detaileddescription.para: Enables the developer to iterate over the observers giving to this function an iterator_func which is called for each observer. If the iterator_func returns false all the iteration stops.

parameterdescription.para: The function that will be execute on each iteration.
The user data that can be passed in the function.
Iterator could not be executed. Some iterate returned false.

briefdescription.para: Add a static channel observation.

detaileddescription.para: This macro initializes a channel observation by receiving the channel and the observer.

briefdescription.para: Add a static channel observation.

detaileddescription.para: This macro initializes a channel observation by receiving the channel and the observer.

briefdescription.para: This macro lists the observers to be used in a file.

detaileddescription.para: Internally, it declares the observers with the extern statement. Note it is only necessary when the observers are declared outside the file.

briefdescription.para: This macro lists the channels to be used in a file.

detaileddescription.para: Internally, it declares the channels with the extern statement. Note it is only necessary when the channels are declared outside the file.

briefdescription.para: This macro indicates the channel has no observers.
This macro indicates the channel has listed observers.

detaileddescription.para: Note the sequence of observer notification will follow the same as listed.

briefdescription.para: This macro indicates the channel does not have a unique ID.

memberdef.name: ZBUS_CHAN_DEFINE

briefdescription.para: Zbus channel definition.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a channel.

parameterdescription.para: The Message type. It must be a struct or union.
A pointer to the user data.
The observers list. The order defines observer priority, with the first observer having the highest priority.

simplesect.para: struct zbus_channel

memberdef.name: ZBUS_CHAN_DEFINE_WITH_ID

briefdescription.para: Zbus channel definition with numeric identifier.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines a channel.

parameterdescription.para: The Message type. It must be a struct or union.
A pointer to the user data.
The observers list. The order defines observer priority, with the first observer having the highest priority.

simplesect.para: struct zbus_channel

briefdescription.para: Initialize a message.

detaileddescription.para: This macro initializes a message by passing the values to initialize the message struct or union.

parameterdescription.para: Variadic with the initial values. ZBUS_INIT(0) means {0}, as ZBUS_INIT(.a=10, .b=30) means {.a=10, .b=30}.

memberdef.name: ZBUS_SUBSCRIBER_DEFINE_WITH_ENABLE
memberdef.initializer: K_MSGQ_DEFINE(_zbus_observer_queue_##_name, \ sizeof(struct zbus_channel *), \ _queue_size, sizeof(struct zbus_channel *) \ ); \ static struct zbus_observer_data _CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name) = { \ .enabled = _enable, \ IF_ENABLED(CONFIG_ZBUS_PRIORITY_BOOST, ( \ .priority = ZBUS_MIN_THREAD_PRIORITY, \ )) \ }; \ _ZBUS_CPP_EXTERN const STRUCT_SECTION_ITERABLE(zbus_observer, _name) = { \ ZBUS_OBSERVER_NAME_INIT(_name) /* Name field */ \ .type = ZBUS_OBSERVER_SUBSCRIBER_TYPE, \ .data = &_CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name), \ .queue = &_zbus_observer_queue_##_name, \ }

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize a subscriber.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of subscriber type. It defines a message queue where the subscriber will receive the notification asynchronously, and initialize the struct zbus_observer defining the subscriber.

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize a subscriber.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of subscriber type. It defines a message queue where the subscriber will receive the notification asynchronously, and initialize the struct zbus_observer defining the subscriber. The subscribers are defined in the enabled state with this macro.

memberdef.name: ZBUS_LISTENER_DEFINE_WITH_ENABLE
memberdef.initializer: static struct zbus_observer_data _CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name) = { \ .enabled = _enable, \ IF_ENABLED(CONFIG_ZBUS_PRIORITY_BOOST, ( \ .priority = ZBUS_MIN_THREAD_PRIORITY, \ )) \ }; \ _ZBUS_CPP_EXTERN const STRUCT_SECTION_ITERABLE(zbus_observer, _name) = { \ ZBUS_OBSERVER_NAME_INIT(_name) /* Name field */ \ .type = ZBUS_OBSERVER_LISTENER_TYPE, \ .data = &_CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name), \ .callback = (_cb) \ }

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize a listener.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of listener type. This macro establishes the callback where the listener will be notified synchronously, and initialize the struct zbus_observer defining the listener.

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize a listener.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of listener type. This macro establishes the callback where the listener will be notified synchronously and initialize the struct zbus_observer defining the listener. The listeners are defined in the enabled state with this macro.

memberdef.name: ZBUS_MSG_SUBSCRIBER_DEFINE_WITH_ENABLE
memberdef.initializer: static K_FIFO_DEFINE(_zbus_observer_fifo_##_name); \ static struct zbus_observer_data _CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name) = { \ .enabled = _enable, \ IF_ENABLED(CONFIG_ZBUS_PRIORITY_BOOST, ( \ .priority = ZBUS_MIN_THREAD_PRIORITY, \ )) \ }; \ _ZBUS_CPP_EXTERN const STRUCT_SECTION_ITERABLE(zbus_observer, _name) = { \ ZBUS_OBSERVER_NAME_INIT(_name) /* Name field */ \ .type = ZBUS_OBSERVER_MSG_SUBSCRIBER_TYPE, \ .data = &_CONCAT(_zbus_obs_data_, _name), \ .message_fifo = &_zbus_observer_fifo_##_name, \ }

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize a message subscriber.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of ZBUS_OBSERVER_SUBSCRIBER_TYPE type. It defines a FIFO where the subscriber will receive the message asynchronously and initialize the zbus_observer defining the subscriber.

briefdescription.para: Define and initialize an enabled message subscriber.

detaileddescription.para: This macro defines an observer of message subscriber type. It defines a FIFO where the subscriber will receive the message asynchronously and initialize the zbus_observer defining the subscriber. The message subscribers are defined in the enabled state with this macro.

briefdescription.para: Zbus API.
